Blockchain VC Funding.title: Koinify: The Future of Crypto Crowd Funding
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Koinify presents itself as a platform exploring the future of crypto crowd funding, aiming to revolutionize how projects raise capital within the decentralized ecosystem. It highlights new opportunities for community-driven investment in blockchain ventures.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Crypto’s new funding mechanisms: down and dirty guide

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Nasdaq, Citi Join Novogratz in Funding Blockchain Firm Symbiont
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq and Citi have participated in a funding round for blockchain firm Symbiont, alongside Michael Novogratz, signifying growing institutional investment in the blockchain sector. This investment highlights major players backing enterprise-grade distributed ledger technology.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is funding blockchain technology initiatives through its Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) programs. This effort aims to leverage blockchain for various security-related applications and foster innovation within the space.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Funding Blockchain Ecosystems
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: This research explores the various approaches and challenges involved in funding entire blockchain ecosystems, rather than individual projects. It delves into strategies for sustained capital allocation to foster widespread development and adoption of decentralized technologies.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Indian Banks to Start Blockchain-Based Funding for SMEs to Avoid Defaulters
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are set to introduce blockchain-based funding platforms for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) to enhance credit assessment and minimize loan defaults. This initiative aims to increase transparency and efficiency in the lending process for businesses.
